---
description: "Structured intake for a new feature proposal before spec sync."
mode: "agent"
---

# Receive Feature Signal: {{input}}

1. Read `docs/SYSTEM_STATE.md`.
2. Check for blockers that pause new intake.
3. Assess phase or milestone fit.
4. Flag obvious compatibility concerns.
5. Route accepted work to `sync-external-spec`.

Always update system state when a new feature signal is accepted, queued, or blocked.
